gates.name: B1_PARITY_GATE
gates.description: Capture Parity Baseline: >= 95% parity with deterministic reason codes

testResults: ✓ should compute parity rate from artifacts
✓ should generate reason codes for mismatches
✓ should mark report as passed when parity meets threshold
✓ should emit parity report with deterministic structure

gates.name: B2_DETERMINISM_GATE
gates.description: Deterministic Normalization: <= 1% unexpected diff over 20 repeated runs

testResults: ✓ should normalize entry by zeroing generatedAt
✓ should canonicalize numeric values to 3 decimals
✓ should normalize manifest by sorting entries and zeroing timestamps
✓ should strip entropy from manifests for determinism
✓ should classify diffs as expected vs unexpected
✓ should produce identical JSON after normalization
